title: French Tartiflette
description: A rich, French-inspired casserole dish showcasing the decadence of burrata cheese and the heartiness of tartiflette.
instructions: Peel and slice the potatoes into 1/2-inch thick rounds.
Caramelize the onions in a skillet over medium heat for 20 minutes.
Cook the bacon in the skillet until crispy, then set aside.
In a separate saucepan, heat the burrata cheese over low heat until melted and smooth.
In a large baking dish, arrange the potatoes in a single layer.
Sprinkle the caramelized onions, crispy bacon, and melted burrata cheese over the potatoes.
Season with thyme, salt, and black pepper to taste.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
Let the dish rest for 5-10 minutes before serving to allow the flavors to meld.
